generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureHumidityLightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensor within the physical greenhouse monitoring environmental parameters including temperature, humidity, and light levels."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentParameterDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualitySensorSet : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry-Pi equipped sensor suite measuring indoor air quality parameters including CO2 concentration, particulate matter, temperature, and humidity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded encoder/IMU system measuring real-time position coordinates (X, Y, Z) of the gantry crane and pucks."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneKinematicDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocityAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-frequency sensor system capturing velocity, acceleration metrics, and state flags for the lab-scale gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneDynamicDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded system monitoring operational status, puck presence, and error conditions of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStatusDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance EnvironmentParameterDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumidityLightSensor
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualitySensorSet
]

instance CraneKinematicDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneDynamicDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocityAccelerationSensor
]

instance CraneStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateMonitor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GreenhouseBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive logic model for greenhouse operations enabling real-time behavioral adjustments based on sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBSynchronizationEnabler
]

instance AirQualitySimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computational fluid dynamics model simulating indoor air quality dynamics for virus spread prediction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTProcessingEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic model implementing forward/inverse kinematics for gantry crane trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROSControlEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentParameterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series dataset containing temperature, humidity, and light level measurements from the physical greenhouse."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentParameterDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseBehavioralModel
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time air quality measurements including CO2 concentration, particulate matter, temperature, and humidity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualitySimulationModel
]

instance CraneKinematicData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High-resolution position, velocity, and acceleration data stream from gantry crane sensors at 10-100Hz sampling rate."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneKinematicDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneKinematicModel
]

instance CraneDynamicData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped operational state data including trajectory events, error conditions, and system status flags."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneDynamicDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneKinematicModel
]

instance CraneStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring data of crane operational status, puck presence, and system health indicators."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance InfluxDBSynchronizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database enabling efficient synchronization between physical greenhouse sensor data and digital twin behavioral models."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService
]

instance AzureIoTProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure platform providing cloud-based analytics, simulation, and real-time visualization capabilities for air quality management."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance ROSControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System framework facilitating sensor-actuator integration, service orchestration, and real-time control for the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneOptimizationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for high-throughput crane kinematic data storage and historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asynchronous message broker facilitating real-time communication between logging application and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance AutomationMLRepresentationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized digital twin representation format enabling interoperability between physical system components and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for air quality visualization services."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time service enabling adaptive behavioral adjustments of both physical greenhouse and its digital twin based on sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseOptimizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime simulation and prediction service analyzing air quality dynamics to prevent virus spread in indoor environments."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityRecommendationInsight
]

instance CraneOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Closed-loop optimization service computing energy-efficient trajectories and dynamic compensation for crane kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneTrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service implementing kinematic discrepancy detection between predicted and actual crane states."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneFaultDetectionInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data acquisition service logging sensor data streams and control commands at high temporal resolution for post-analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides CranePerformanceBenchmarkingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User interface service rendering 3D CAD models with overlaid real-time kinematic data for system monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization service for air quality data providing interactive dashboards and 3D representations of air quality metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityRecommendationInsight
]

instance DarTwinEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Metadata management service tracking system modifications in a versioned ontology for traceability."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance GreenhouseOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights for optimizing greenhouse environmental conditions based on real-time behavioral adaptation."
]

instance AirQualityRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics recommendations for maintaining optimal indoor air quality to prevent virus transmission."
]

instance CraneTrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory plans reducing power consumption and improving precision for gantry crane operations."
]

instance CraneFaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Proactive fault detection alerts identifying misalignment, wear, or operational anomalies in crane systems."
]

instance CranePerformanceBenchmarkingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical performance metrics enabling fault diagnosis, benchmarking, and machine learning training datasets."
]

instance CraneVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of crane kinematics with trajectory plots and force distribution overlays."
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Versioned metadata tracking all modifications to physical/digital twin systems for traceability and compliance."
]

// C1: Environments
instance GreenhouseEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical greenhouse environment containing embedded sensors and controlled environmental systems."
    base:contains TemperatureHumidityLightSensor
]

instance IndoorAirQualityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Indoor environment containing Raspberry-Pi sensor platform measuring air quality parameters."
    base:contains AirQualitySensorSet
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale cyber-physical system environment containing gantry crane mechanism and embedded controllers."
    base:contains CranePositionSensor
    base:contains CraneVelocityAccelerationSensor
    base:contains CraneStateMonitor
]

// C6: Components
instance GreenhouseController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded controller responsible for real-time motion control and sensor interfacing within the greenhouse system."
    base:isContainedIn GreenhouseEnvironment
]

instance RaspberryPiPlatform : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry-Pi platform serving as the central processing unit for air quality sensor data acquisition and preprocessing."
    base:isContainedIn IndoorAirQualityEnvironment
]

instance GantryCraneMechanism : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Core mechanical system including bridge structure, hoist, and trolley for X/Y axis movement in lab-scale gantry crane."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance EmbeddedCraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time motion control system interfacing with crane sensors and actuators for operational management."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this Digital Twin system is orchestrated by the **Control Application**, a Python service that generates and executes commands for the physical gantry crane. Control flows involve **trajectory-based commands** derived from the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which uses a **kinematics model** to optimize crane movements with **zero-residual swinging** at the endpoint.

**Command Types**:
- **Trajectory commands**: High-level path definitions (e.g., start/end positions, velocity profiles) sent to the **Control Application**.
- **State commands**: Low-level control signals (e.g., enable/disable crane, reset controllers).

**Control Message Formats**:
- Commands are transmitted via the **Physical Crane Interface** in a **proprietary or low-level format** (unspecified), likely structured as **JSON or binary payloads** for efficiency.

**Validation and Authentication Mechanisms**:
- No explicit mention of authentication, but the **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories against simulated ones using **distance metrics** (e.g., Euclidean distance) to detect deviations. If thresholds are breached, operators are notified via the **Dashboard**.

**Feedback Systems**:
- The system lacks explicit feedback loops for real-time adjustments, but the **Logging Application** captures post-execution data for analysis, and the **Simulation Service** can simulate trajectories for validation.

**Conflict Resolution**:
- Not described in the documents. Assumed to rely on **priority-based or time-stamped command handling** in the Control Application.

**Command Execution Confirmation**:
- The **Physical Crane Interface** likely provides **acknowledgment signals** (e.g., success/failure flags) to the Control Application, though specifics are not detailed.
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents employ **ad-hoc orchestration patterns** without formalized frameworks. **GreenhouseDT** uses **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, **ActiveMQ** for message brokering (likely for asynchronous communication), and **virtual machines (VMs)** with pre-recorded data to facilitate twin-physical synchronization. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar integrates **AutomationML-based Digital Twin** with **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline implementation, suggesting a **cloud-centric orchestration** with **Azure services** (e.g., IoT Hub, Stream Analytics) for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is described using the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization but lacks explicit details on **orchestration patterns**, **component integration**, or **resource management**. All exemplars avoid commercial Digital Twin frameworks, opting instead for **customized, domain-specific solutions** with **containerization/virtualization** (e.g., VMs) for deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **behavioral adaptation** of both the physical and digital systems, implying a **closed-loop validation mechanism** where discrepancies between the twin and the physical greenhouse trigger adaptive adjustments. However, explicit **model fidelity requirements**, **validation and verification methods**, or **uncertainty quantification** are not detailed. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar leverages **AutomationML** for digital twin representation, which inherently supports **structured model validation** through standardized data exchange. While **Microsoft Azure tools** enable simulation and prediction, the documents do not specify **error detection and correction mechanisms** or **quality assurance processes**. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** exemplar does not provide information on fidelity or validity considerations in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Technical Connection** infrastructure relies on an **MQTT-based messaging system** for inter-service communication, with the **MQTT Broker** acting as the central hub. The network architecture is not explicitly detailed, but the following assumptions and specifics can be inferred:

**Communication Protocols**:
- **MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport)**: Used for asynchronous, lightweight messaging between containers (e.g., Logging Application → Dashboard, Trajectory Generator → Control Application).
- **Unspecified physical layer protocols** for Physical-to-Virtual data (likely Ethernet, USB, or serial for crane controllers).

**Network Topology and Architecture**:
- **Decentralized microservices architecture**: Containers (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service) communicate via MQTT topics, with the broker ensuring decoupled, scalable interactions.
- **No explicit mention of a service mesh or dedicated network topology**, but the C4 Model implies a **logical separation** between physical and digital components.

**Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**:
- Not quantified, but **low-latency requirements** are implied for real-time control (e.g., trajectory execution). MQTT’s publish-subscribe model is optimized for **high-throughput, low-latency** scenarios.
- The **Continuous Validation Service** suggests **real-time comparison** of executed vs. simulated trajectories, necessitating **sub-second latency** for validation alerts.

**Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**:
- No redundancy mechanisms are described. Assumed to rely on **MQTT QoS levels** (e.g., QoS 1 for at-least-once delivery) and **TimescaleDB’s durability** for data persistence.
- The **Physical Crane Interface** may include **retry logic** for failed commands, though not specified.

**Security Protocols**:
- Not mentioned. Assumed to require **MQTT TLS/SSL encryption** for broker communication and **authenticated access** to the TimescaleDB database.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is not explicitly detailed, but the following inferences can be drawn from the context:

**Hosting Platforms**:
- **On-premise deployment**: The system is described as a **lab-scale gantry crane** with no mention of cloud or edge computing. The **Physical Crane** and its interface are co-located, implying a **single-site deployment**.

**Computational and Storage Requirements**:
- **Computational**:
  - **Trajectory Generator Service**: Requires a **kinematics model** (unspecified complexity) for real-time trajectory optimization.
  - **Simulation Service**: Likely demands **moderate computational resources** for physics simulations (e.g., crane dynamics).
  - **Continuous Validation Service**: Needs **real-time distance metric calculations** (e.g., Euclidean/Manhattan distance) between executed and simulated trajectories.
  - **Logging Application**: High **I/O throughput** for TimescaleDB ingestion.
- **Storage**:
  - **TimescaleDB**: Optimized for **time-series data**, with no specified capacity but likely **gigabytes-scale** for logged crane trajectories and sensor data.

**Scalability Mechanisms**:
- Not described. The system appears **monolithic in scope** (lab-scale), with no mention of horizontal scaling (e.g., container orchestration with Kubernetes). Vertical scaling (e.g., upgrading server resources) may be required for larger datasets.

**Deployment Models Supported**:
- **Single-node deployment**: All containers (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Dashboard) likely run on a **single machine** or a **small cluster** of interconnected servers.
- **No mention of container orchestration** (e.g., Docker Swarm, Kubernetes), suggesting a **manual or scripted deployment** approach.

**Availability/Reliability Assurance**:
- **No redundancy or failover mechanisms** are described. Reliability depends on:
  - **TimescaleDB’s durability** for data persistence.
  - **MQTT broker’s persistence** (if configured) for message queuing.
  - **Physical Crane Interface’s robustness** for hardware communication.
- **Manual operator intervention** is implied for critical failures (e.g., threshold breaches in the Continuous Validation Service).
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The provided Digital Twin systems exhibit **limited horizontal integration** with external systems. **GreenhouseDT** integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) but does not mention **interoperability standards** or **enterprise system dependencies**. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **Microsoft Azure tools** (e.g., IoT Hub, Stream Analytics) for cloud-based processing, implying **Azure-specific integration patterns** but no broader **open standards** (e.g., OPC UA, DDS). The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system lacks explicit details on external integrations. None of the exemplars reference **standardized data exchange protocols** (e.g., MQTT, RESTful APIs) or **interoperability with other Digital Twins**. The **ad-hoc nature** of these systems prioritizes **domain-specific solutions** over **scalable, enterprise-grade integration**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly mention adherence to **industry standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010, IEEE P2414), **certification requirements**, or **compliance frameworks** for the Digital Twin systems. **GreenhouseDT** and **Air Quality Management** exemplars use **AutomationML** (ISO 15926-10) for digital twin representation, indicating partial standardization in **interoperability** for engineering domains. However, no mention of **OPC UA**, **ROS 2**, or other widely adopted DT standards (e.g., **OMG Digital Twin Reference Model**) is present. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** lacks standardization details. Interoperability is ad-hoc, relying on **Raspberry Pi** sensors and **Azure/InfluxDB** for data exchange without formalized protocols."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs an **ad-hoc security approach** with no explicit mention of formal data governance, privacy protection, or compliance frameworks (e.g., GDPR, CCPA). The system relies on **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, which lacks native encryption-by-default for sensitive data, though InfluxDB supports TLS/SSL for secure communication. **ActiveMQ** is used as a message broker, which requires manual configuration of **JMS security policies** (e.g., SASL, ACLs) for authentication and authorization. The virtual machine (VM) deployment includes **prerecorded data**, but no documentation specifies data anonymization, access controls, or consent management mechanisms. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar similarly lacks explicit security details, though it uses **Microsoft Azure tools**, which inherently include **Azure Active Directory (AAD)** for identity management and **Azure Policy** for compliance enforcement. However, the exemplar does not detail how these are implemented or whether they cover data ownership, anonymization, or sharing agreements. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is not described in the provided documents, so no security or privacy measures can be inferred. Overall, the exemplars adopt **implicit security assumptions** (e.g., containerization for isolation) but omit explicit documentation of governance, privacy safeguards, or safety-critical risk assessments."
]
